# GymSpaYoga

> GymSpaYoga is a wellness discovery marketplace and social community connecting people with verified gyms, spas, yoga studios, personal trainers, therapists, and chiropractors across India and worldwide.

GymSpaYoga helps users find, compare, and book wellness services. Businesses and wellness professionals can list their services, reach nearby customers, and engage with a fitness-focused community feed.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Discover gyms, spas, yoga studios, trainers and more near you.
- [Gyms](/gyms): Browse verified gyms with pricing, amenities and reviews.
- [Spas](/spas): Luxury spas, massages and wellness therapies.
- [Yoga](/yoga): Yoga studios, classes and certified instructors.
- [Trainers](/trainers): Certified personal trainers for gym, home and online sessions.
- [Therapists](/therapists): Licensed massage and wellness therapists.
- [Chiropractors](/chiropractors): Verified chiropractors and spinal care specialists.
- [Community](/community): Wellness-focused social feed for users, businesses and trainers.
- [Blogs](/blogs): Articles on fitness, yoga, nutrition and wellness.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Plans for businesses and trainers.
- [About](/about): About GymSpaYoga and our mission.
- [Support](/support): Help center and contact.
- [Explore](/explore): Explore wellness services across categories.
- [Register a Business](/register-business): List a gym, spa or yoga studio.
- [Register as a Trainer](/register-trainer): Join as a certified trainer.

## Optional

- [Privacy Policy](/privacy-policy)
- [Terms of Service](/terms-of-service)
